description: CompositionWhite and navy blue striped V-neck pullover made of an acrylic and polyester blend, has a ribbed neckline and cuffs, and appliqué on the chestFittingRegularWash careHand wash in cold waterDo not machine washWash dark colours separatelyUse mild detergentDo not bleachDo not wringDo not tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryWinter is back! Step out and celebrate the winter chill in the warmth of this pullover from scullers. Put it over a round neck t-shirt or just a vest, and pair it with jeans and sports shoes for that warm touch while you enjoy steaming hot street food in the cold.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in pulloversHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
